label: Bullish
explanation: 7/10 is bullish from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise as Apple notches record high - Yahoo Finance; Mortgage rates rise to highest level in nearly a year, causing homebuyers to pause. Bearish offsets: Dow Jones Futures: Taiwan Semi, GE Aerospace Fall Despite Strong Earnings; AI Slide Continues; Wall Street ends lower as Iran tensions dampen risk appetite; chipmakers drop By Reuters - Investing.com.
